Bash(sed -i 's/let mongoServer, mongoClient, db, app;/let mongoClient, db, app;/' "$f")

Bash(NODE_PATH=/home/fullstackfang/.npm/_npx/b5c678b49b10706e/node_modules node -e "
const sharp = require\('sharp'\);
sharp\('public/emanuel_logo.png'\)
  .flatten\({ background: { r: 255, g: 255, b: 255 } }\)
  .toFile\('public/emanuel_logo_white.png'\)
  .then\(info => console.log\('Success:', JSON.stringify\(info\)\)\)
  .catch\(err => console.error\('Error:', err\)\);
")

Bash(NODE_PATH=/home/fullstackfang/.npm/_npx/b5c678b49b10706e/node_modules node -e "
const sharp = require\('sharp'\);

// Flatten transparency to white, resize to square 512x512 for quality
sharp\('/mnt/c/Users/Stephen.Fang/Pictures/emanuel_logo_transparent.png'\)
  .flatten\({ background: { r: 255, g: 255, b: 255 } }\)
  .resize\(512, 512, { fit: 'contain', background: { r: 255, g: 255, b: 255 } }\)
  .png\(\)
  .toFile\('public/emanuel_logo.png'\)
  .then\(info => console.log\('Logo saved:', JSON.stringify\(info\)\)\)
  .catch\(err => console.error\('Error:', err\)\);
")
